question: Will Bitcoin exceed $150,000 by June 30, 2026?
description: Market resolves YES if BTC/USD spot price closes above $150,000 on Coinbase on any day before June 30, 2026.

question: Will the Federal Reserve cut interest rates at the May 2026 FOMC meeting?
description: Resolves YES if the Fed announces a rate cut of at least 25bps at the May 6-7 FOMC meeting.

question: Will the S&P 500 close above 7,000 by December 31, 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the S&P 500 index closes at or above 7,000 on any trading day in 2026.

question: Will Ethereum ETF net inflows exceed $1 billion in April 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the total net inflows across all US-listed spot Ethereum ETFs exceed $1B in April 2026.

question: Will Apple announce a consumer AR/VR headset under $1,500 at WWDC 2026?
description: Resolves YES if Apple announces a new AR or VR headset with a retail price under $1,500 at WWDC 2026.

question: Will US CPI inflation fall below 2.5% year-over-year by August 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the US Bureau of Labor Statistics reports CPI inflation below 2.5% YoY for any month through August 2026.

question: Will OpenAI announce or complete an IPO by end of 2026?
description: Resolves YES if OpenAI publicly files for or completes an IPO on a major stock exchange by December 31, 2026.

question: Will there be a US federal government shutdown before June 30, 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the US federal government experiences a funding lapse (shutdown) of 24 hours or more before June 30, 2026.

question: Will Solana (SOL) price exceed $500 by July 31, 2026?
description: Resolves YES if SOL/USD spot price closes above $500 on Coinbase on any day before July 31, 2026.

question: Will any AI lab claim to achieve AGI before January 1, 2027?
description: Resolves YES if a major AI lab (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Anthropic, Meta AI, or xAI) publicly claims to have achieved Artificial General Intelligence by end of 2026.
